title: selaginella phanotricha
intro: Selaginella phanotricha, also known as Indian fern or false fern, is a type of spore-producing plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing inflammation and protecting cells from damage. The health benefits of Selaginella phanotricha include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, capsules, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
